events.title: Launch day
events.description: PromptVault goes live with 159 prompts. Posted to Reddit — r/ChatGPT, r/PromptEngineering, r/SideProject.

events.title: First 100 prompts
events.description: Curated and tested 100+ prompt templates across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.

events.title: The idea
events.description: Tired of writing the same prompts over and over. Started saving the ones that worked. Built a library.
